title: Replace cardio dog image with equipment and add new hero background

requirements.text: In the image gallery component (frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx), remove the black French Bulldog workout image from the Cardio Zone section and replace it with a photo of actual cardio equipment from the facility

quotes: we need to remove the black dog picture in the cardio section and replace it with cardio equipment pic

acceptanceCriteria: The black French Bulldog image is removed from the Cardio Zone section in the image gallery
A real cardio equipment photo from Bodyshape Fitness facility is displayed in the Cardio Zone section
The image maintains consistent dimensions and styling with other gallery images

requirements.text: Replace the homepage hero section background (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) with the uploaded Bodyshape Fitness 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png), applying fade/opacity effects to make it a visually striking centerpiece while maintaining readability of foreground content

quotes: need to add this picture in the background as the main picture of the website. you can fade it out or whatever needs done to make it the centerpiece

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) is set as the background for the hero section
The image is positioned and sized appropriately to serve as the main visual centerpiece
Fade/opacity effects are applied to ensure text and other content remain readable over the background
The styling is responsive and looks good on mobile and desktop viewports

constraints: Use the uploaded image file 86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Maintain existing hero section content layout and structure while updating the background styling
Ensure the background treatment does not compromise the readability of hero text and call-to-action elements
nonGoals: Modifying the content or text of the hero section
Changing the image gallery layout or structure beyond replacing the specified image
Adding new sections or features to the homepage

required: Photo of cardio equipment at Bodyshape Fitness facility showing treadmills, ellipticals, or exercise bikes (cardio-equipment.dim_800x600.png)
